children.text: administer the programs and projects conducted under sections 5811 and 5813 of this title through the National Institute of Food and Agriculture, Agricultural Research Service, and other appropriate agencies;
establish a minimum of four Regional Administrative Councils in accordance with subsection (b); and
in conjunction with such Regional Administrative Councils, identify regional host institutions required to carry out such programs or projects.

children.label: A
children.text: the Agricultural Research Service;

children.label: B
children.text: the National Institute of Food and Agriculture;

children.label: C
children.text: State cooperative extension services;

children.label: D
children.text: State agricultural experiment stations;

children.label: E
children.text: the Soil Conservation Service;

children.label: F
children.text: State departments engaged in sustainable agriculture programs;

children.label: G
children.text: nonprofit organizations with demonstrable expertise;

children.label: H
children.text: farmers utilizing systems and practices of sustainable agriculture;

children.label: I
children.text: agribusiness;

children.label: J
children.text: the State or United States Geological Survey; and

children.label: K
children.text: other persons knowledgeable about sustainable agriculture and its impact on the environment and rural communities.

children.label: A
children.text: promote the programs established under this subchapter at the regional level;

children.label: B
children.text: establish goals and criteria for the selection of projects authorized under this subchapter within the applicable region;

children.label: C
children.text: appoint a technical committee to evaluate the proposals for projects to be considered under this subchapter by such council;

children.label: D
children.text: review and act on the recommendations of the technical committee, and coordinate its activities with the regional host institution; and

children.label: E
children.text: prepare and make available an annual report concerning projects funded under sections 5811 and 5813 of this title, together with an evaluation of the project activity.

children.heading: Conflict of interest
children.label: 3 Conflict of interest
children.text: A member of the Regional Administrative Council or a technical committee may not participate in the discussion or recommendation of proposed projects if the member has or had a professional or business interest in, including the provision of consultancy services, the organization whose grant application is under review.
